title: Stage 02 Design Gate
description: Stage 2 (Design) gate. Authored by the principal agent after the design review concludes. Both arch_approved and pm_approved must be true to pass.

arch_approved.description: Principal sign-off on the design after considering the parallel dev annotations.

pm_approved.description: PM confirms the design still fits the brief's scope and acceptance criteria.

adr_count.description: Number of ADR files written under pipeline/adr/ during this design pass.

adrs_consulted.description: Optional (G8 architectural continuity). Prior ADR identifiers Principal consulted via `devteam memory query --org --kind adr` before drafting. Empty array means greenfield-by-record. Use the form '<project-cwd>#pipeline/adr/NNNN-slug.md' to match how the org store keys records.

adr.description: The prior ADR id being superseded.

rationale.description: Why the prior decision no longer holds — what changed, what was learned.

adrs_superseded.description: Optional (G8). Prior ADRs this design explicitly retires. Silent disagreement with prior ADRs is forbidden; this array is the audit trail.

file_ownership.description: Optional machine-readable copy of design-spec.md §File Ownership. Keys are repo-relative file paths or glob patterns; values are the owning Stage 4 workstream. Used by driver auto-fix routing to target the workstream that owns a blocker-named file.
